Notes: ECP5-85F central FPGA. EE must assign balls from datasheet.
Southbridge. All debug via USB-C. No FTDI needed.
ECP5 configuration flash in master-SPI mode.
RPLU table flash on RP2350 SPI0 (separate bus from config).
VCC_CORE HF decoupling. Stagger via ESL by trace length.

Pull-ups: CS# MODE1 MODE2 PROGRAM# SD_CMD SD_DAT0.
Series term: SPI_SCK SPI_MOSI PIO_D[0:7] STROBE DIR.
VCC_PLL ferrite bead isolation (220 ohm @ 100 MHz).
USB-C for all debug/programming. CC resistors for 5V/3A.
RP2350 main crystal. NOT an oscillator. Needs 2x 18pF caps.
